SEARCH
Package com.group02.tars.storage

Class JsonFileStorage

java.lang.Object
com.group02.tars.storage.JsonFileStorage
All Implemented Interfaces:
FileStorage
public class JsonFileStorage extends Object implements FileStorage
File-based FileStorage implementation backed by JSON files.

The implementation reads and writes users.json, jobs.json, and applications.json under the resolved data directory. Public load and save operations synchronize on a shared lock so each file operation is performed atomically within this storage instance.

  • Constructor Summary

    • JsonFileStorage

      public JsonFileStorage(jakarta.servlet.ServletContext context) throws IOException
      Creates storage using the data directory resolved for the servlet context.
      Parameters:
      context - servlet context used for data-directory resolution
      Throws:
      IOException - if directories or bootstrap files cannot be created

    • loadUsers

      public List<User> loadUsers() throws IOException
      Loads users from users.json.
      Specified by:
      loadUsers in interface FileStorage
      Returns:
      stored users, or an empty list when the file is missing or empty
      Throws:
      IOException - if user data cannot be read

      Writes users to users.json.
      Specified by:
      saveUsers in interface FileStorage
      Parameters:
      users - complete user collection to persist
      Throws:
      IOException - if user data cannot be written
